    C

    CIRCLE - Enum constant in enum class ToolMode
    Tool mode for drawing circles.

    D

    DrawingPane - Class in Unnamed Package
    Interactive drawing canvas for creating and editing geometric shapes.

    Constructs the DrawingPane and registers all mouse event handlers.

    Fill color of the shape, stored as a JavaFX color string (e.g.

    G

    GeometricFiguers - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main application class for the Geometric Figures drawing tool.
    GeometricFiguers() - Constructor for class GeometricFiguers
     
    getFillColor() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the fill color as a string.
    getRotate() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the rotation angle.
    getScaleX() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the X scale factor.
    getScaleY() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the Y scale factor.
    getStrokeColor() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the stroke color as a string.
    getStrokeWidth() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the stroke width.
    getTranslateX() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the X translation offset.
    getTranslateY() - Method in class ShapeData
    Returns the Y translation offset.

    I

    IMPORT - Enum constant in enum class ToolMode
    Tool mode for importing a drawing (reserved).

    L

    loadDrawing() - Method in class DrawingPane
    Loads shapes from a binary file and adds them to the current canvas.
    loadFromFile(String) - Static method in class FileIO
    Loads a list of shapes from a binary file.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class GeometricFiguers
    Application entry point.

    P

    POLYGON - Enum constant in enum class ToolMode
    Tool mode for drawing polygons (placed vertex by vertex).

    R

    RECTANGLE - Enum constant in enum class ToolMode
    Tool mode for drawing rectangles.
    rotate - Variable in class ShapeData
    Rotation angle in degrees.

    S

    SAVE - Enum constant in enum class ToolMode
    Tool mode for saving the drawing (reserved).
    saveDrawing() - Method in class DrawingPane
    Saves all shapes currently on the canvas to a binary file.
    saveToFile(ArrayList, String) - Static method in class FileIO
    Saves a list of shapes to a binary file.
    scaleX - Variable in class ShapeData
    Scale factor along the X axis.
    scaleY - Variable in class ShapeData
    Scale factor along the Y axis.
    setFillColor(String) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the fill color.
    setFillColor(Color) - Method in class DrawingPane
    Sets the default fill color for newly created shapes.
    setRotate(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the rotation angle.
    setScaleX(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the X scale factor.
    setScaleY(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the Y scale factor.
    setStrokeColor(String) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the stroke color.
    setStrokeWidth(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the stroke width.
    setToolMode(ToolMode) - Method in class DrawingPane
    Sets the active drawing tool mode.
    setTranslateX(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the X translation offset.
    setTranslateY(double) - Method in class ShapeData
    Sets the Y translation offset.
    ShapeData - Class in Unnamed Package
    Abstract base class for storing serializable shape data.
    ShapeData() - Constructor for class ShapeData
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class GeometricFiguers
    Initializes and displays the main application window.
    strokeColor - Variable in class ShapeData
    Stroke (border) color of the shape, stored as a JavaFX color string.
    strokeWidth - Variable in class ShapeData
    Width of the shape's border stroke.

    T

    ToolMode - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
    Enum defining the available drawing tool modes.
    translateX - Variable in class ShapeData
    Translation offset along the X axis.
    translateY - Variable in class ShapeData
    Translation offset along the Y axis.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ToolMode
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class ToolMode
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
